zh: 此時孩子的動作更協調和穩定了、
en: By this age, children's movements are more coordinated and stable.

zh: 可以向各種運動玩具挑戰、
en: They can take on all kinds of active play equipment —
walking forward on a balance beam,

zh: 盪鞦韆也能穩當的爬上攀登架、
en: swinging, and climbing up the jungle gym with confidence.

zh: 另一方面在手作DIY的活動中也能運用材料和工具、
en: In hands-on DIY activities they can use materials and tools,
